scope: Top-priority PHILOMATH ingestion chapters only. Claims are recorded as best-effort reductions from local QA/Open-Brain-derived notes, not from a verified in-session full text.

claims.claim: Digital root is a modular filter that can organize number behavior into residue classes.
claims.qa_rewrite: Treat digital root strictly as projection into Z/9Z and use only residue-class consequences.
claims.promotion_test: Show that the downstream QA use depends only on mod-9 arithmetic, not on decimal-digit mysticism.

claims.claim: Prime numbers occupy structured symmetry classes on a mod-24 wheel / icositetragon.
claims.qa_rewrite: Reduce to prime residue classes modulo 24 and explicitly separate possible-prime spokes from primality proofs.
claims.promotion_test: Verify every promoted statement as a residue-class fact or computational wheel-filter fact.
claims.notes: Useful bridge to existing QA mod-24 language.

claims.chapter: Reciprocity of Numbers and Prime Factorization
claims.claim: Factorization can be interpreted through mirror symmetry or reciprocal geometric pairings.
claims.qa_rewrite: Recast as factor-pair symmetry, difference-of-squares heuristics, or explicit factor-graph constructions.
claims.promotion_test: Require an arithmetic factor identity or graph invariant; reject purely visual reciprocity claims.
claims.notes: Good candidate for a mirror-graph notebook, not a proof source by itself.

claims.claim: Numbers can be grouped into recursive harmonic classes or root-like families.
claims.qa_rewrite: Map classes to explicit modular taxonomies, tuple families, or recursive graph labels.
claims.promotion_test: Each class must have an exact rule, membership test, and counterexample boundary.
claims.notes: Promising if converted into a formal taxonomy ledger.

claims.claim: Semiprimes admit a geometric interpretation that reveals their factors.
claims.qa_rewrite: Use geometry only as a depiction of already-verified semiprime relations or mirror planes in factor graphs.
claims.promotion_test: Require arithmetic recovery of the factors from the proposed construction.
claims.notes: Admit only as a geometry bridge until recovery is executable.

claims.claim: Numbers descend through recursive root shells or ancestry trees.
claims.qa_rewrite: Translate into recursive tuple trees, modular collapse pathways, or explicitly generated rooted graphs.
claims.promotion_test: Provide a deterministic recursion rule and confirm repeatability on sample inputs.
claims.notes: Useful as recursive language if stripped of mysticism.

claims.claim: Base-12 provides a privileged harmonic framework for cyclic structure.
claims.qa_rewrite: Use base-12 as one convenient cyclic scaffold among several, not as an unquestioned universal base.
claims.promotion_test: Show explicit computational convenience or symmetry advantage over nearby bases.
claims.notes: Good corpus bridge; avoid exclusivity claims.

claims.claim: Musical intervals and sound structure can be represented through integer ratio geometry.
claims.qa_rewrite: Keep only interval-ratio, cycle, and lattice claims that can be represented with exact arithmetic.
claims.promotion_test: Express promoted claims as exact ratios, modular cycles, or reproducible tuning transforms.

claims.claim: Specific integers such as 108, 216, and 432 carry privileged harmonic significance.
claims.qa_rewrite: Downgrade to optional harmonic motifs unless a modular derivation produces them non-arbitrarily.
claims.promotion_test: Require explicit generation rule and comparison against nearby control values.
claims.notes: Do not allow numerology to enter the canonical layer.

claims.claim: Time and space can be replaced by tuple-phase and modular displacement dynamics.
claims.qa_rewrite: Treat as a model proposal requiring explicit state variables and update equations.
claims.promotion_test: Produce a discrete dynamics model with observable outputs or certifiable invariants.
claims.notes: No direct promotion without formal model.

claims.claim: Gravity and electromagnetism can be reinterpreted as modular phase-field effects.
claims.qa_rewrite: Keep only as phase-field analogy until there is a precise operator model or empirical witness.
claims.promotion_test: Define operators, compute predictions, and compare against reference cases.

claims.claim: Consciousness emerges from recursive harmonic self-reference in number-geometry structures.
claims.promotion_test: None until a clear operationalization exists.
